name: list_resources
description: List assets in your Cloudinary account. Supports filtering by resource type, prefix (folder), tag, and moderation status. Returns paginated results with cursor-based navigation.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: Type of resources to list: image, video, or raw. Defaults to image.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Delivery type filter: upload, private, authenticated, fetch.

parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: Filter by public ID prefix (acts as folder filter).

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-500). Defaults to 10.

parameters.name: next_cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: If true, include the list of tags for each resource.
